name: py-exec
description: Run Python code inline, execute a script file with args, pipe stdin through Python, or change directory and set timeout; with auto-venv detection and environment variables.

parameters.name: code_or_script
parameters.description: Inline Python code, or -f <script.py> [args...] for script execution

parameters.name: -f, --file
parameters.description: Path to a Python script file to execute

parameters.name: --venv
parameters.description: Path to virtual environment to activate

parameters.name: --cd=DIR, -C DIR
parameters.description: Change to directory before running (replaces cd + python pattern)

parameters.name: --timeout=N
parameters.description: Timeout in seconds (replaces timeout N + python pattern)

cost_saving_rationale: Collapses cd + timeout + python3 -c/heredoc into one step, saving step count and tool call characters; --cd replaces cd + python two-step pattern, --timeout replaces timeout N wrapper step.
